tools.name: projects.associateDeviceWithPlacement
tools.description: Associates a physical device with a placement.

tools.name: projects.createProject
tools.description: Creates an empty project with a placement template. A project contains zero or more placements that adhere to the placement template defined in the project.

tools.name: projects.deletePlacement
tools.description:
Deletes a placement. To delete a placement, it must not have any devices associated with it.

When you delete a placement, all associated data becomes irretrievable.

tools.name: projects.deleteProject
tools.description:
Deletes a project. To delete a project, it must not have any placements associated with it.

When you delete a project, all associated data becomes irretrievable.

tools.name: projects.describePlacement
tools.description: Describes a placement in a project.

tools.name: projects.describeProject
tools.description: Returns an object describing a project.

tools.name: projects.disassociateDeviceFromPlacement
tools.description: Removes a physical device from a placement.

tools.name: projects.getDevicesInPlacement
tools.description: Returns an object enumerating the devices in a placement.

tools.name: projects.listPlacements
tools.description: Lists the placement(s) of a project.

tools.name: projects.listProjects
tools.description: Lists the AWS IoT 1-Click project(s) associated with your AWS account and region.

tools.name: projects.updatePlacement
tools.description: Updates a placement with the given attributes. To clear an attribute, pass an empty value (i.e., "").

tools.name: projects.updateProject
tools.description: Updates a project associated with your AWS account and region. With the exception of device template names, you can pass just the values that need to be updated because the update request will change only the values that are provided. To clear a value, pass the empty string (i.e., "").

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags (metadata key/value pairs) which you have assigned to the resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Creates or modifies tags for a resource. Tags are key/value pairs (metadata) that can be used to manage a resource. For more information, see AWS Tagging Strategies.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes one or more tags (metadata key/value pairs) from a resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
